children.text: Warm & Mostly Dry Weather Sticks Around
Looking at temperatures over the next 36 hours with our FutureCast.

We're talking above average temperatures for the next 9 days and no severe weather threat. But that doesn't mean you don't need to be prepared for severe weather. Come see Storm Team 9 tomorrow at the AUburn, Academy Sports. We'll be programming weather radio from 10-2CT. You can bring one in or buy on there. Don't forget to bring batteries. Three AA are needed for the ones you buy there!
Tuesday Evening Weather on the Go
